website.title: Spine Swarm | State-of-the-art research and client-ready deliverables
website.description: Spine is an agentic platform that runs parallel AI agents across 300+ models to research, create client-ready deliverables, and automate work across your apps.
headings: AI agents that research, reason, and deliver — benchmarked #1 for accuracy.
Parallel agent swarms, not one-at-a-time chat
website.text_excerpt: Spine Swarm | State-of-the-art research and client-ready deliverables AI agents that research, reason, and deliver — benchmarked #1 for accuracy. Spine orchestrates 300+ AI models as parallel agents to conduct deep research and produce polished reports, slides, spreadsheets, and dashboards — ranked #1 on Google DeepMind’s DeepSearchQA benchmark. Parallel agent swarms, not one-at-a-time chat Dispatch a brief and Spine runs research, synthesis, and document creation in parallel. Multiple agents each handle a workstream and pass structured output to the next, returning a complete deliverable rather than a thread of text responses. State-of-the-art research, benchmarked #1 Spine Deep Research scores 87.6% on Google DeepMind’s DeepSearchQA — the hardest public multi-step research benchmark — ahead of Perplexity Deep Research (79.5%), Claude (76.1%), ChatGPT (71.3%), and Gemini Deep Research (66.1%). Client-ready output in real formats Goldman Sachs-style reports, .pptx strategy decks, .docx briefs, Excel models with formulas and scenario tabs, competitive benchmarks, financial projections, and interactive dashboards — formatted and ready to send, not rough drafts. Automations across your apps Schedule recurring Spine workflows (daily, weekly, monthly, or custom) and connect them to the tools you already use via integrations, MCP, API, and webhooks. Use cases by role Investors Market sizing, competitive landscapes, earnings analysis, and investment memos — from public filings and data. Build a TAM/SAM/SOM model for [market] triangulating industry reports, public company disclosures, and analyst estimates — with sources, assumptions, and scenario tabs Research 15+ companies in [sector], their positioning, funding, revenue signals, and key risks — produce an investment thesis...

website.text_excerpt: Smuggl - Share your localhost as an invite only link Smuggl Install How it works License Contact Download Install How it works License Contact Share your localhost as an invite only link Download Now How it works → Download Now How it works → Get started Install 01 Choose your platform macOS Windows Linux 02 Install Terminal Copy $ curl -sSL https://publicupdates.smuggl.dev/install.sh | sh Requires macOS 12 or later 03 Run Terminal $ smuggl Privacy by Design 01 . Tunnel Secure WebSocket Connection One command opens a WebSocket to Smuggl's server. You get a unique URL. Your machine is never exposed. 02 . Control Access Approval Every request pauses at the server. You see the visitor's IP and path, then allow or block. 03 . Proxy Transparent Forwarding Approved requests flow over the WebSocket to your localhost and back. The visitor sees a normal page. 04 . Erasure Instant Teardown Close the CLI and the URL dies immediately. No DNS lingers, no sessions persist. Zero traces. analysis.official_details: 官网可访问，公开页面显示该项目围绕开发者工具提供产品入口和功能说明。可确认的公开线索包括：人工智能能力。未看到明确披露的价格、模型供应商、云厂商、数据库或后端框架时，统一按未公开处理。
analysis.technical_signals: 公开页面可确认的技术/数据线索：人工智能能力；分类标签只作为主题参考，不等同于技术栈。；未公开信息不做推断：后端框架、数据库、云厂商、模型供应商、安全架构等只有在官网、文档、源码或招聘页明确出现时才记录。
analysis.market_context: 它属于开发者工具方向，周榜排名第 50，获得 161 票、69 条评论。这个数据说明早期受众愿意讨论和投票，但仍只是发布热度信号；真正市场情况还需要继续验证付费转化、留存、获客渠道和替代方案强度。分类标签已保留在项目卡片上方，本栏不把标签当作市场结论。
analysis.feedback_summary: 详情页解析到 12 条评论样本，总评论数显示为 69。主要反馈集中在：正面认可和发布支持；功能、集成或落地方式追问；价格/套餐关注；数据、隐私或分析能力关注；团队/活动/企业场景讨论。
analysis.risks: 人工智能能力需要证明稳定性、成本可控和相对普通自动化的差异；榜单热度不能直接证明收入、留存或规模化获客。
analysis.verdict: 已完成详情页和官网级别的基础富集。Ogoron 值得继续观察；下一步应重点验证真实留存、付费意愿、获客效率、交付成熟度以及相对替代方案的差异化。
